title: Senior Conveyancing Lawyer (Central / 5 days)
description:
Company Profile

We are one of Singapore’s established law practice offering practical, client-focused legal advice across our core pillars including property and conveyancing, private client and family matters, wills and probate, and general dispute advisory work. We secure our client’s trust by utilizing a full hands-on approach, close partner involvement, and emphasis on clear, commercially sensible solutions.

Our treasured lawyers here benefit from broad exposure, early responsibility, and direct client interaction within a collegial, stable team environment that prioritizes mentorship, professional development, and long-term career growth over rigid hierarchy.

Location: Tanjong Pagar (5 mins walk from MRT)

Working hours: Monday to Friday, 9.00am to 6.00pm

Key Responsibilities:

  • Client Consultation & Communication: Provide legal advice on various property transactions, such as sale and purchase agreements, leases, and title transfers.
  • Drafting Legal Documents: Prepare and review legal documents, including contracts, sale and purchase agreements, and other paperwork related to property transactions.
  • Due Diligence & Research: Conduct property title searches and due diligence on land records and related documentation. Review titles and assess risks to identify any potential legal concerns.
  • Transaction Management: Oversee the entire conveyancing process, from initial instructions to completion and settlement.
  • Negotiation: Facilitate settlements and resolve disputes related to property transactions when necessary.
  • File Management & Compliance: Maintain accurate and up-to-date records for all property transactions, including legal documents, correspondence, and financial details.
  • Professional Development: Stay informed on changes in property law and regulations to offer clients the most up-to-date legal advice.

Requirements:

  • Min. Bachelor's Degree in Legal Practice from an approved university on SILE
  • Called to the Bar or have passed the Bar Exams
  • Prior experience as a Practising Conveyancing Lawyer is a bonus but not a must
  • Team-player and strong judgement in exercising professional law advice to clients
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

📩 Your recruiter: WhatsApp your CV/resume to Celine at 8977 7051 for a quicker response.

You may also drop your resume via email tocelinechan@envirodynamics.com.sg – only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Celine Chan I Reg. No: R21103433

EnviroDynamics Solutions Pte Ltd I EA License No.: 12C6285

In addition, we also provide a range of recruitment and human capital solutions as employment agency to our clients in engineering and technology industries.
